posts.author: ashleyME (Ashley M)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Monday.com Community!

I am looking into what app/software I can use that either integrates directly with monday.com or I can connect through Zapier to send a bulk email to contacts in a specific group on a board. Any ideas are appreciated! Preferably free to nonprofits.

Thanks!

posts.author: m.frank (Marcel Frank)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @ashleyME,
I think you could do this with teams.

A similar request was here:

Bulk emails to all in a group Feature requests
Hey Sally! You can do this through creating a “team” in the account and then selecting the team as the recipient in your Gmail or Outlook integration, or selecting “Board subscribers” as the recipient in case you want to send it to everyone on the board. Here’s a screenshot of those two options in an example automation recipe: [Screen Shot 2022-11-30 at 5.20.13 PM] Would this work for the type of bulk emails you’re looking to send?

Cheers,
Marcel
